{{Quote|I'm incident commander. I say how and when anyone goes in.|Dovel to Omega Squad|<ref name="Targets" />}}
'''Dovel''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Police officer/Legends|police officer]] who lived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. He served with the [[Coruscant Security Force/Legends|Coruscant Security Force]] and, by the beginning of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], Dovel had reached the [[Police rank|rank]] of [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Dovel was the [[Incident commander]] of a [[Galactic City spaceport hostage siege|hostage situation]] at the [[Galactic City/Legends|Galactic City]] [[Galactic City Spaceport|Spaceport]] initiated by [[Korun/Legends|Korun]] [[Terrorist/Legends|terrorists]]. As a [[Meena Tills|senator]] was one of the hostages, the [[Senate Guard/Legends|Senate Guard]] had sent a detachment under [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Jaller Obrim]] to assist the CSF. With the high publicity, [[Clone commando/Legends|Clone commando]] [[Omega Squad]] was sent to assist as well. Dovel, who debated with Commander Obrim over who had control of the scene, was at first against storming the [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] and preferred to wait until a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] negotiator, [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Kaim]], arrived. However, the terrorists [[Death/Legends|killed]] Master Kaim during the negotiations. After that, Dovel gave Omega Squad the go ahead to storm the building. They did so and were able to take out the terrorists, ending the siege.<ref name="Targets" />

==Behind the scenes==
Dovel first appeared in ''[[Omega Squad: Targets]]'', a short story written by [[Karen Traviss]] and published in [[Star Wars Insider 81|''Star Wars Insider'' 81]] in [[March]] [[2005]].
